references.name: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
observedPatterns: System font stack (SF Pro) with clear weight hierarchy
Generous corner radii (16-20px) on content containers
Cool neutral palette with blue accent
adaptedElements: Corner radius values and shadow depths

references.name: Apple Keynote Bento Grid Layouts
observedPatterns: Variably-sized modular tiles in a grid mosaic
Gradient fills on feature highlight tiles
High information density through tile sizing strategy
adaptedElements: Blue gradient for hero stat tile
